text: In this video, we will know what are the forms and what is the input tag in the form Using the form is an important element of websites because you submit data from client to server through the form These are the forms which you see on contact pages, google forms or enquiry forms The details of the flight or railway ticket, date and time, where to go and where to go are submitted through the HTML forms In the last video, very few people liked it I will request you to like this video with high energy so that we can maintain high energy throughout the course So let's go to the computer screen and see the forms, input tags and some best practices Let's roll the intro So guys, I have come to my computer screen and now see I am going to make a folder here which I am going to name video6 because this is the 6th video, I will click on shift right and open with code I have already told you all about this and now I am going to make index.html and I will put an exclamation mark in it I will do view word wrap, screen cast mode and I will write forms here let's learn it so I have set the title of this forms page and by setting the title, we can see the actual title on our page and I want to tell you about a very important setting some of you guys have also asked me if we have to click so many times, can we do something? yes, you can, click on gear, settings and after that, simply write live preview and we can actually set it so that whenever we click on it, it will open on the external browser so now I will close everything and as soon as I click on it, it will open on the external browser and I will come to my browser and I will click on the sigma web development codes playlist and click on bookmark but now I want to tell you that as soon as we click on it, it will open so if you want to do this, then do it but sometimes you will want to do side by side view and when you want to do that, you can actually use HTML CSS
